answer_levels.label: 完整一点
answer_levels.english: Could you help me with this?
answer_levels.chinese: 可以帮我处理一下这个吗？
answer_levels.usage: 不确定怎么说时很万能。

answer_levels.label: 更礼貌一点
answer_levels.english: Could you please take a look at this?
answer_levels.chinese: 可以麻烦你看一下这个吗？
answer_levels.usage: 需要对方帮忙查看时用。

sentences: Could you help me with this?
Could you please take a look at this?
episodes.scene: 飞机上找空乘 Excuse me, could you help me? / 不好意思，可以帮我一下吗？
episodes.hook: 飞机上找空乘 Excuse me, could you help me? / 不好意思，可以帮我一下吗？
episodes.preview:
下集继续讲飞机上找空乘
Excuse me, could you help me? / 不好意思，可以帮我一下吗？
Could you help me put this up? / 可以帮我把这个放上去吗？
May I have a blanket? / 可以给我一条毯子吗？
Could I have some water? / 可以给我一些水吗？
My seat screen isn't working. / 我的座位屏幕不能用。里的卡壳表达。
